step_rationale: Lp-PLA2 hydrolyzes oxidized phospholipids in oxLDL; drives plaque inflammation and rupture risk.
mechanism: Lp-PLA2 generates inflammatory mediators from oxidized lipids within atherosclerotic plaques, promoting destabilization and rupture.
